greeting: Ho there, friend! Care to see my wares? Finest goods between Ashford and the coast!
I've trinkets from the south and curiosities from the north. Something for everyone!
The roads are dangerous for a merchant travelling alone, but the coin makes it worthwhile.
quest: I had a crate of goods stolen by bandits near the old oak. Bring it back and I'll let you pick anything from my stock.
idle: Buy low, sell high... if only the bandits would cooperate.
I should raise my prices. The roads get worse every season.
